description: FFmpeg encoder -- child process spawn, stdin piping of raw frame data (PNG or raw RGBA buffers), H.264 encoding parameters, pixel format options, output container format (MP4). Implements the encoding half of C-02. Independent of Puppeteer -- receives raw pixel buffers via stdin regardless of their source.
notes: Tier 2 engine core. Independent of Puppeteer -- only needs project scaffolding. Spec completed via 4-round deliberation. Video-only MP4 output; audio muxing deferred to OBJ-014.
